title: Ketchikan, Alaska (1915 panoramic view)
description: 1915 panoramic photograph of Ketchikan, Alaska, showing the full sweep of the town along Tongass Narrows beneath forested mountains. Copyright deposit by F. W. Sheelor, May 14, 1915.
alt: 1915 panoramic photograph of Ketchikan, Alaska along Tongass Narrows with forested mountains behind the town
